feedback.text: I am particularly interested in highlighting digital games. Some games are only available online, and we are not allowed to run our own servers to play them. So when the company/developers decide to shut them down, we can no longer play them. A good example is The Crew, made by Ubisoft. I want to be able to run my own servers so that I can continue playing the games I have purchased after the game developers can no longer host them.
